changes.description: 🐞 Fix AutoComplete clear icon overlap issue on search icon.
🐞 Fix Button align issue when is `disabled` and wrapped by Tooltip.
🐞 Fix Cascader search need to press down arrow twice to select item. [-Xuan](https://github.com/Kermit-Xuan)
🐞 Fix Carousel cannot works on Snowpack.
🐞 Fix ConfigProvider `componentSize` not works on DatePicker.RangePicker.
🐞 Fix Descriptions cannot fit to small container width.
⚡️ Optimization Form.Item with multiple noStyle children Form.Item message collection performance.
🐞 Fix Grid broken style using Col without `span`.
💄 Add InputNumber RTL style.
- 🛠 Menu inherit `line-height` from header.
- 🐞 Fix Menu unexpected scrollbar when show and hide.
🐞 Fix Progress Dashboard won't allow `gapDeg` to be `0`.
🛠 Adjust Radio.Group logic that `value` is `undefined` should be uncontrolled mode.
⚡️ Reduce Row unnecessary render when `gutter` is array.
💄 Tweak RangePicker arrow shadow style.
🐞 Fix Select dropdown menu vertical padding.
🐞 Fix Slider tooltip crash when with `nullable` value.
- 🐞 Fix Table ColumnGroup with controlled `sorterOrder` not working issue.
- 🐞 Fix Table border radius style.
- 🐞 Fix Table fixed column height issue.
- 🐞Fix Table row expand icon show error in ipad.
- 🛠 Table `column.filter` support `boolean` value.
- 🐞 Fix Table filter no working when only set `onFilter`.
🐞 Fix TreeSelect `treeIcon` not working.
🐞 Refactor DirectoryTree to fix deprecated warning.
🐞 Fix Typography nest list style issue.
🐞 Adjust Upload `onChange` return `fileList` is immutable data to avoid render issue.
- 🐞 Omit Table `getCheckboxProps` typeof `checked`.
- 🐞 Fix Menu horizontal Item with nest Icon miss margin style.
- 🐞 Fix Menu item wrong `title` when setting `getPopupContainer`.
- 💄 Optimize the style of Icon in Menu.
- 🐞 Fix Avatar in horizontal Menu `margin` issue.
- 🐞 Fix an issue where the position of 'slider handle' is incorrect in the vertical case of Slider.
- 💄 Fix Slider missing `focus` style.
- 🐞 Fix ConfigProvider not work on Table filter dropdown.
- 🐞 Fix Table nest tree column expandable style issue with fixed column.
- 🐞 Fix an issue where Table filtering throws `cannot read property 'map' of undefined`.
- 🐞 Fix Table expandable column not fixed when selection column is fixed.
- 🐞 Fix Table filter menu reset not working.
- 🐞 Fix Table filter sub menu max height with many items.
- 💄 Optimize the responsive and box model performance of The Form.
- 🐞 Fix FormItem hooks render error.
🐞 Fixed the problem of using custom icons to wrap in Input.Group.
💄 Adjust Select single padding style to avoid tweak with dropdown.
💄 Fix Calendar header select ellipsis bug.
💄 Fixed Dropdown content and icons overlapping.
🐞 Fix Select ellipsis bug in Firefox.
🐞 Remove PageHeader unnecessary `overflow: hidden` style,Optimize PageHeader extra buttons responsive design.
🐞 Fix TextArea `autoSize` don't scroll bottom in Firefox.
- 💄 Optimize the style of Pagination in RTL mode.
- 💄 Fixed the icon style with Cascader RTL.
- 💄 Optimize the Checkbox.Group style in RTL mode.
- 💄 Optimize Radio.Button style issues in RTL mode.
- 🐞 Optimize table-pinned style issues that are listed under RTL.
- 💄 Adjust the direction of the Dropdown icon in RTL mode.
- 💄 Optimize the Breadcrumb style in RTL mode.
- 💄 Optimize the style of the Steps component in RTL mode.
- 💄 Optimize styles in RTL mode with form feedback.
- 🐞 Fix nest Form.Item dynamic remove will warning in React.
- ⚡️ Form `useForm` now return same instance for perfermance.
- ⚡️ Refactor Form.Item render logic that will only render once when children is a pure component.
- ⚡️ FormContext use a memoized value to avoid trigger FormItem's unintentional renders.
- 🐞 Fix Table dropdown popup at abnormal direction.
- 🐞 Fix Table `expandIconColumnIndex` display order with `rowSelection`.
- 🐞 Fix Table `size="small"` header background color is not same as other size.
- 🐞 Fix Table `className` and `style` works on wrong node.
- 🐞 Fix Select align issue with empty string value.
- 🐞 Fix small size Select tag text not align middle.
- 🐞 Fix Menu bottom margin is missing.
- 🐞 Fix horizontal Menu extra margin of Menu.Item with only icon.
- 🐞 Fix Menu popup menu overflow issue when contains too many items.
🐞 Fix Badge animation when switch between 10 and 11.
🐞 Fix Radio.Button inside Tooltip throws `Function components cannot be given refs` warning.
🐞 Fix Descriptions miss style when content is falsy.
🐞 Fix DatePicker cursor style on `seperator`.
🐞 Fix ConfigProvider `prefixCls` not working on Input.Password.
🐞 Fix Carousel `dots` not align center.
🐞 Fix Input.Search border style in `rtl` mode.
- 🆕 Add `-fade` variable.
- 🆕 Add `-item-label-height` variable.
- 🐞 Fix Form help control will get `react.13` warning.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item exceed Form width when content is too long.
- 🐞 Fix TextArea style get warning in `react.13`.
- 🐞 Fix Input.Search extra border when has `prefix`.
- 🐞 Fix Table column with `filtered` not working.
- 🐞 Fix Table locale not work.
- 🐞 Fix Table.Column `sortOrder` is not working in JSX mode.
- 🐞 Fix Table fixed column with sorted status style issue.
🐞 Fix Dropdown menu arrow position.
🐞 Fix List `bordered` and `split` props conflict.
🐞 Fix Menu.Item `a` tag hidden bug.
🐞 Fix `message.open` crash when `icon` is not passed.
🐞 Fix Result `status` cannot assigned to string or number type.
🐞 Fix Descriptions warning for duplicate key.
💄 Optimize Calendar header style in small screen.
💄 Radio.Group not wrapping now.
🛠 Refactor icons import code to reduce webpack disabled tree shaking bundle size.
- 🐞 Fix Radio.Button type error.
- 🐞 fix `TreeSelect.SHOW_*` type.
- 🐞 Fix TreeSelect missing `suffix` define.
- 🐞 Fix Drawer `forceRender` TypeScript definite.
- 🐞 Fix Tree `treeData` define.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item `renderProps` return type define.
🐞 Breadcrumb use `path` as default key to fix `name` key conflict.
🐞 Fix Table filter menu max height style with many items.
💄 Add the Calendar component's custom default font color for display content.
🐞 Fix RangePicker style render bug in IE11.
🛠 Progress `strokeColor` now will ignore incorrect percent.
🐞 Fix Progress `trailColor` not working when `type=line`.
🐞 Fix the background of the components in the pop-up components in the dark theme.
- 💄 Optimization under the dark theme color swatches transparency.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item with `help` align style.
- 🐞 Fix Form throw error when using BraftEditor.
- 🐞 Fix Form fields shake when switching the validing info.
- 🐞 Fix Upload identify types of image logic errors.
- 🐞 Fix Input with `readOnly` still clearable by `allowClear`.
- 🐞 Fix Input click with `prefix` / `suffix` not get focused.
- 🐞 Fix Table selection crash when record children is `null`.
- 🐞 Fix Table fixed column style with `small` size.
- 🐞 Fix `label` does not have the problem of still rendering the label element when not using `bordered`.
- 🐞 Fix Non-bordered titles under `vertical` are also a problem for `td`.
- 🐞 Fix `vertical` and `bordered` layout issues.
- 🐞 Fix the problem of `style` not working on `Item`.
- 🐞 Fix `th` will also get the useless `-colon` className problem under `border`.
💄 Picker `onPanelChange` will also trigger when panel value changed.
🐞 Fix Notification first call multiple time can not stack.
🐞 Fix TreeSelect popup do not update issue.
💄 Optimize Upload `showDownloadIcon` default doesn't show.
💄 Tweak Divider inner text `padding` and add `-text-padding`.
- 🐞 Fix Form types.
🐞 Fix Form.Item `validateFirst` prevent form submit.
🐞 Fix InputNumber cursor position issue when deleting consecutive identical numbers.
💄 Remove Menu excess background color.
💄 Optimize the mouse style for the `disabled` state of the DatePicker component.
🐞 Fix Affix throws `Cannot read property getBoundingClientRect` in mobile device.
🐞 Fix the problem that the label width is incorrect when the screen is less than `xs`.
🐞 Fix Input `size` is `large` height style.
🐞 Fix Badge `color` not working when contains children.
🐞 Fix Alert close button extra padding.
💄 Tweak Steps 1px align issue.
💄 Fix legacy Button.Group `large` size style issue.
💄 Fix Input border radius with suffix, style in Firefox, TextArea allowClear style issues.
🐞 Pagination will pass `disabled` prop to prev/next buttons return by `itemRender`.
💄 Redesign the style of ink bar for Tabs.
💄 Add less variable `-item-label-font-size`.
🐞 Fix Badge style for Badge with Typography.
🐞 Fix Checkbox not work when Checkbox and Checkbox.Group are separated by other component.
🐞 Fix Collapse.Panel wrong content width when `extra` prop is set.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item `required` validation not work when name is not set.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item data binding not work when `name` is `0`.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item shaking when `help` prop change from valuable to `undefined`.
- 🐞 Fix worng validating style when `prefix` is set.
- 🐞 Fix `size` prop not work when `prefix` or `affix` is set.
🐞 Fix Radio.Group style with Badge.
🐞 Fix Select no margin between lines when mode is `tags` or `multiple`.
🐞 Fix Slider dots focus style. [-Xuan](https://github.com/Kermit-Xuan)
🐞 Fix Steps icon not align when `size="small"` and `labelPlacement="vertical"`.
- 🐞 Fix `expandIcon` prop not work when data item has no `children` field.
- 🐞 Fix Column `sorter` prop not work.
- 🐞 Fix custom filter's typing not work.
🐞 Fix TimePicker `defaultOpenValue` prop not work.
- 🐞 Fix wrong unit for checkbox label of header.
- 🐞 Fix icon not align in search input.
🐞 Fix Typography not focus at the end of textarea when editable is true.
🛠 Use native Date instead of moment to get timestamp in Countdown component.
🐞 Fix Input `suffix / prefix` style issue with `addonBefore / addonAfter`.
💄 Improved Timeline component style in RTL mode.
💄 Update `clearfix` mixin to remove legacy `zoom` descriptor.
💄Card component use `-size-base` instead of inline `14px`.
💄 Adjust Layout component to let `className` get higher priority.
- 🐞 Fix Tree wrong event type of AntTreeNodeMouseEvent. [-Lhotka](https://github.com/Jirka-Lhotka)
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item return type define.
🛠 Refactor some demos to React hooks and TypeScript.
🐞 Fixed Input/Select components align issue.
- 🆕 Support `buttonsRender` to customize buttons.
- 🐞 Tooltip doesn't disappear on `disabled` Dropdown.Button in Chrome.
- 🐞 Fixed Input `prefix` and `suffix` overlap with content issue.
- 🐞 Fixed Input `placeholder` color in Firefox.
- 🐞 Fixed `onChange` return cached fresh sorter & filter state.
- 🐞 Fixed problem that all-checkbox is checked when all the checkboxes are disabled.
- 🐞 Fixed `locale.emptyText` not working.
- 🐞 Fixed `placeholder` wrap and align issue.
- 🐞 Fixed multiple Select left padding.
- 🐞 Fixed multiple Select clean icon overlap issue.
- 🆕 Added scroll options as `scrollToField` argument.
- 🐞 Fixed Form.Item update `help` makes layout shake.
- 🐞 Fixed unexpected extra rerender when Form.Item is not a real Field.
- 🐞 Fixed Form.Item ignore `help=""` issue.
- 🐞 Fixed Form.Item `label` align bug in small screen.
🐞 Fixed message cut shadow issue.
🐞 Fixed Tooltip hidden when `title` is `0`.
🐞 Fixed List `actions` inconsistent position.
🆕 Add a visual list example for Tree.
🐞 Fixed AutoComplete example styling issue.
🗑 Removed AutoComplete useless `labelInValue`.
🐞 Fixed Drawer `footerStyle` prop cause react warning.
🐞 Fixed Breadcrumb style in `rtl` mode.
💄 Tweak Layout `className` order to end.
- 🐞 Export DatePicker related interface.
- 🆕 Readded `-radius-sm`.
- 🆕 Added `-item-padding-bottom`.
- 🆕 Added `-header-color`.
- 🐞 Fix expanded icon not work when `expandRowByClick` is set.
- 🐞 Fix expanded row width in scaled dom element and border style.
- 🐞 Fix background color css priority too high to override user customize style.
- 🐞 Fix `rowSelection` of `fixed` not work.
- 🐞 Fix fixed columns in Chrome show the vertical scrollbar.
- 🐞 Fix crash when columns with empty children.
💄 Tweak Calendar basic style month drop-down box width and notice items of word order and card mode, select the size of the box.
- 💄 Optimize the `border-radius` of the rounded corners connection.
- 🐞 Fix selected style overlap.
- 🐞 Fix extra dividing line at the bottom.
- 🐞 Fix button style for DatePicker's default range.
🐞 Input not block user input when value is `undefined`.
🐞 Fix Carousel card carousel orientation in left / right mode.
🐞 Fix Grid responsive gutter under SSR initial value of `0`.
🐞 Fix InputNumber, Select and other components icon size.
🐞 Fix Badge `z-index` higher than Table fixed columns.
💄 Tweak font family to be same as tailwindcss.
🐞 Fix TextArea `autoSize` blink in FireFox.
🐞 Fix Form.Item not keep error message sync when hit rule changed.
🐞 Fix Form.Item add additional feedback style when `hasFeedback` is not set.
🐞 Fix Cascader search bug when `fieldNames` is existed and label/value share same name.
🐞 Fix Collapse background color with wrong less variable.
🐞 Fix Slider's Tooltip not follow handle.
🐞 Fix Card cover image get skretched.
🐞 Fix Typography automatic overflow with `suffix` property.
🐞 Fix AutoComplete with customize component with wrong style.
🐞 Fix Input.Group to be partial to a pixel in Form.
- 🐞 Export Form interfaces.
- 🐞 Fix Table types.
- 🐞 Fix Table.Column and Table.ColumnGroup definition.
💄 New dark theme support.
- 💄 Optimized `expand` animation effect.
🐞 Fix the display error of Carousel component `dotposition` as`left | right`.
🐞 Fix Alert style text overflow.
💄 Add `-color-split-popover`、`-icon-hover-color`、`-clear-background`、`-menu-border-color-split`、`-header-border-color-split`、`-to-color`、`-item-hover-bg` and other less variables.
